kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Username And Valid Password
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Valid Username And Valid Password' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Valid Username And Valid Password' found.

kw.name: And User Clicks The Login Button
Then User Should See Success Login Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Invalid Username And Valid Password' found.

test.name: TC_001 Authentication With Valid Credentials

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in the login form

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters password in the login form
When the user enters valid username and password

kw.name: And User Clicks Login Button
Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button
And the user clicks the login button

kw.name: Then User Should Be Authenticated And Redirected To Products Page
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Then User Should Be Authenticated And Redirected To Products Page' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Then User Should Be Authenticated And Redirected To Products Page' found.

kw.name: And User Should See Products List
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'Then User Should Be Authenticated And Redirected To Products Page' found.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in the login form

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Enters password in the login form
When the user enters valid username and password

kw.name: And User Clicks Login Button
kw.doc: And the user clicks the login button

kw.name: Then User Should Be Authenticated And Redirected To Products Page
When User Adds First Product To Cart
Then Product Should Be Added To Cart
And Cart Badge Should Appear With Item Count
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_003 Access Cart And Verify Items

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in the login form

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Enters password in the login form
When the user enters valid username and password

kw.name: And User Clicks Login Button
kw.doc: And the user clicks the login button

kw.name: Then User Should Be Authenticated And Redirected To Products Page
When User Adds First Product To Cart
Then Product Should Be Added To Cart
When User Clicks On Cart Icon
kw.doc: When the user clicks on the shopping cart icon

kw.name: Then Cart Page Should Be Displayed With Added Product
And Product Price Should Be Visible In Cart
And Total Price Should Be Calculated Correctly
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
